title: Week 12 - 综合数学算法项目
description: 练习组合数组统计和分类计数。

questions.title: 班级成绩分析

description.statement: 返回总分和及格分数的数量。
description.output: 两个返回值：总分和及格数量。

questions.reference_code:
function solution(scores)
    local total = 0
    local passCount = 0
    for i = 1, #scores do
        total = total + scores[i]
        if scores[i] >= 60 then
            passCount = passCount + 1
        end
    end
    return total, passCount
end
